title: Hardly optimised
description: a modpack that focuses on optimisation more than features
body:
# 🚀 Hardly Optimised  
### *The definitive Fabric performance pack for 1.16.5 → 1.21.x*  
**Tested on i5-4570/4GB DDR3/Tiny11 - No theoretical benchmarks!**

---

## ⚠️ **Critical Warning: Minecraft 1.21.5-1.21.7 Unsupported**  
**All versions between 1.21.5 and 1.21.7 suffer from severe Intel GPU freezes** (Mojang-confirmed bug).  
- ❌ **No longer supported** in this modpack  
- ❌ **No stability fixes** will be backported  
- ✅ **Upgrade to 1.21.8 immediately** for crash fixes  

**This is not optional** if you use:  
- Intel UHD
- Any integrated GPU  
- Low-end systems  

**Continuing to use** 1.21.5-1.21.7 *may corrupt worlds during freezes*.

---

## 🔬 **Proven Performance**  
### Hardware Validation  
- **CPU**: Intel Core i5-4570 (4C/4T @ 3.2GHz)  
- **RAM**: 4GB DDR3-1600 (single-channel)  
- **OS**: Tiny11 23H2 (600MB idle RAM usage)  
- **Storage**: DRAM-less SATA SSD  

### Real-World FPS  
| Version  |     FPS | Settings          | RAM Usage |  
|----------|---------|------------------|-----------|  
| 1.16.5   | 47-164 | 8 chunks, Fast   | 1.4GB     |  
| 1.20.4   | 55-106   | 6 chunks, Fancy  | 2.9GB     |  
| 1.21.8   | 76-114  | 6 chunks         | 3.2GB     |  

---

## 🎯 **Version Guide**  
### ✅ **1.16.5 - The Low-End Champion**  
- **Best for**: 4GB RAM systems  
- **Key Mods**:  
  - `Sodium-Fabric` (1.16.5 fork)  
  - `Phosphor` (lighting optimizations)  
  - `FastChest` (container lag fix)  

 ### ⚖️ **1.20.1 - The Modding king**  
- **Requires**: 8GB+ RAM for modded play  
- **Shaders**: Iris works but cuts FPS by 40% on HD 4600  

### ⚖️ **1.20.4 - The Balanced Choice**  
- **Requires**: 8GB+ RAM for modded play  
- **Shaders**: Iris works but cuts FPS by 40% on HD 4600([tricked shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/trickeds-shaders) reccomended) 

### 🚧 **1.21.8 - The Future (With Caveats)**  
- **Critical Fix**: Intel GPU crash patches  
- **Work In Progress**: Some mods still updating  

---

## ⚠️ **4GB DDR3 Limitations**  
- **Max Settings**:  
  - 6 chunk render distance  
  - 0 mipmap levels  
  - No shaders/texture packs  
- **Must**:  
  - Close all background apps  
  - Use Tiny11/AtlasOS  

---

## 📥 **Download Recommendations**  
| Hardware        | Best Version       | Notes                     |  
|----------------|-------------------|---------------------------|  
| 4GB DDR3       | 1.16.5           | Change settings if lag is a problem |  
| 8GB DDR3       | 1.20.4           | Stable for modpacks       |  
| Intel GPU      | 1.21.8           | Required for crash fixes  |  

---
